mapper.select:
SELECT hpt.id, hpt.title, hpt.picture, hpt.is_top, hpt.add_datetime, hpt.status, hpt.textbook_id, COALESCE(t.name, s.name) AS authorName, COALESCE(t_op.name, s_op.name) AS operatorName FROM home_page_textbook hpt LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON hpt.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u_op ON hpt.operator = u_op.id LEFT JOIN teacher t_op ON u_op.id = t_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s_op ON u_op.id = s_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type = 1
AND hpt.status = #{param.status}
AND hpt.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.title}, '%')
ORDER BY hpt.is_top DESC, hpt.add_datetime DESC

SELECT hpt.*, COALESCE(t.name, s.name) AS authorName, COALESCE(t_op.name, s_op.name) AS operatorName FROM home_page_textbook hpt LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON hpt.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u_op ON hpt.operator = u_op.id LEFT JOIN teacher t_op ON u_op.id = t_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type IN (0, 2) LEFT JOIN student s_op ON u_op.id = s_op.user_id AND u_op.user_type = 1
AND hpt.id = #{promotionId}
